summary: Tested Anti-Abuse Protection features for 14-day EU refund. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All cancel/revert flows working correctly. Trial limit of 2 runs displayed correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/marketing/usage returns limit=2 and is_trial=true for trial users
Backend: GET /api/marketing/usage returns trial_active and trial_end fields
Backend: calculate_refund_percent(0) returns 100%
Backend: calculate_refund_percent(1-5) returns 75%
Backend: calculate_refund_percent(6-15) returns 50%
Backend: calculate_refund_percent(16-30) returns 25%
Backend: calculate_refund_percent(31+) returns 0%
Backend: GET /api/billing/cancel-preview rejects free plan users (400)
Backend: GET /api/billing/cancel-preview returns all required fields for paid users
Backend: POST /api/billing/cancel rejects free plan users (400)
Backend: POST /api/billing/revert-cancel fails when no pending cancellation (400)
Backend: MARKETING_USAGE_LIMITS['trial'] = 2
Backend: REFUND_TIERS correctly configured
Backend: POST /api/marketing/run returns 429 when trial limit exceeded
Backend: Cancel flow with growth plan - preview shows usage, refund amount, 14-day info
Backend: Cancel creates cancellation with pro-rata refund
Backend: Double cancellation prevented (400)
Backend: Revert cancellation works correctly
Backend: Refund tiers verified with actual usage counts (0, 1, 5, 6, 15, 16, 30, 31, 50)
Frontend: Billing page hides cancel button for free plan users
Frontend: Billing page shows 'Plan kündigen' link for paid plans
Frontend: Cancel section shows usage count (Genutzte Analysen)
Frontend: Cancel section shows 14-Tage Widerrufsrecht (EU) info
Frontend: Cancel section shows refund amount and percentage
Frontend: Service consent checkbox present and functional
Frontend: Confirm cancel and Keep plan buttons present
Frontend: Cancellation banner appears after cancel
Frontend: Revert button appears in cancellation banner
Frontend: Revert cancellation works - banner disappears
Frontend: Refund transaction (+99 EUR, refunded) shown in history
Frontend: Marketing page shows trial limit (0/2 Analysen)
Frontend: Marketing page shows '(Testphase — max. 2 Analysen)' message
Frontend: Trial badge shows 'Testphase aktiv — bis 2026-04-22'

test_credentials.note: User was temporarily upgraded to 'growth' plan for cancel flow testing, then restored to 'free'

seed_data_creation: Temporarily upgraded test user to growth plan with billing_cycle_start within 14 days for cancel testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Anti-abuse features fully tested. Trial limit of 2 runs working. Pro-rata refund tiers (0=100%, 1-5=75%, 6-15=50%, 16-30=25%, 31+=0%) verified. Cancel/revert flow working in both backend and frontend. Stripe refunds are MOCKED (stored as negative payment_transactions).

mocked_apis.stripe_refunds: MOCKED - stored as negative payment_transactions with payment_status='refunded'

frontend_billing.cancellation_banner: Shows after cancel with revert button
